title: Bitcoin Deepens Losses as Crypto Market Comes Under Pressure
description: Bitcoin is under strong selling pressure, falling over 17% in a week and dropping below USD 60,000. The decline was intensified by USD 532 million in long liquidations on Binance, which triggered additional forced selling. Market sentiment worsened after Strategy sold part of its bitcoin holdings. Although the sale was small — 32 BTC for […]The post Bitcoin Deepens Losses as Crypto Market Comes Under Pressure appeared first on ActionForex.
